phrases.intent_en: Ask where the skull archway is located
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o arco de caveiras?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW AH-ruh-koo DIH kuh-VAY-ruhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: This architectural feature frames the transition into the ossuary space.

likely_response.local: O arco de caveiras está na parede do ossuário, dentro da Capela dos Ossos.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW AH-ruh-koo DIH kuh-VAY-ruhsh ehs-TAH NUH puh-REH-dih DOO aws-WAHR-yoo, DAYNGT-roo DUH kuh-PEH-luh DOOSH AW-soosh.
likely_response.translation_en: The skull archway is on the ossuary wall, inside the Chapel of Bones.

responses.english: The skull archway is on the ossuary wall, inside the Chapel of Bones.
responses.phonetic: AW AH-ruh-koo DIH kuh-VAY-ruhsh ehs-TAH NUH puh-REH-dih DOO aws-WAHR-yoo, DAYNGT-roo DUH kuh-PEH-luh DOOSH AW-soosh.
responses.local: O arco de caveiras está na parede do ossuário, dentro da Capela dos Ossos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Memento Mori inscription is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a inscrição Memento Mori?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH eensk-ree-SOWN meh-MAYNG-too moo-REE?
phrases.cultural_note: The Latin phrase reminds visitors of mortality, reflecting the chapel's historical purpose.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, a inscrição fica sobre a porta.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, AH eensk-ree-SOWN FEE-kuh SOHB-rih AH PAW-ruh-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, the inscription is above the door.

responses.english: Good morning, the inscription is above the door.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, AH eensk-ree-SOWN FEE-kuh SOHB-rih AH PAW-ruh-tuh.
responses.local: Bom dia, a inscrição fica sobre a porta.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Memento Mori inscription is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a inscrição Memento Mori?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH eensk-ree-SOWN meh-MAYNG-too moo-REE?
phrases.cultural_note: The Memento Mori inscription in Latin is a famous reminder of mortality, located on the ossuary walls.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na parede do ossário.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH puh-REH-dih DOO aw-SAHR-yoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, on the ossuary wall.

responses.english: Good morning, on the ossuary wall.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH puh-REH-dih DOO aw-SAHR-yoo.
responses.local: Bom dia, na parede do ossário.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the skull archway is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a entrada com o arco de crânios?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-dee FI-ka a en-TRA-da kom-oo AR-koo-dee CRAN-yoosh? (liaison: kom-oo, ar-koo-dee)
phrases.cultural_note: The skull archway marks the threshold to the ossuary, serving as a traditional memento mori symbol.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, o arco está na entrada principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, AW AH-ruh-koo ehs-TAH NUH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, the arch is at the main entrance.

responses.english: Good morning, the arch is at the main entrance.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, AW AH-ruh-koo ehs-TAH NUH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.local: Bom dia, o arco está na entrada principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the donation box inside is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a caixa de donativos no interior?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH KEYE-shuh DIH doo-nuh-TEE-voosh NOO een-tih-REEOHR?
phrases.cultural_note: Voluntary contributions help maintain the fragile ossuary walls and historical structure.

likely_response.local: Pode perguntar ao fiscal da igreja ou no balcão de informações para saber a localização exata.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih peh-ruh-goonng-TAHR OW feesh-KAHL DUH eeg-REH-zhuh OHW NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH PUH-ruh suh-BEHR AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN eh-ZAH-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: You can ask the church guard or at the information desk for the exact location.

responses.english: You can ask the church guard or at the information desk for the exact location.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih peh-ruh-goonng-TAHR OW feesh-KAHL DUH eeg-REH-zhuh OHW NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH PUH-ruh suh-BEHR AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN eh-ZAH-tuh.
responses.local: Pode perguntar ao fiscal da igreja ou no balcão de informações para saber a localização exata.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a inscrição Memento Mori?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH eensk-ree-SOWN meh-MAYNG-too moo-REE?

likely_response.local: A inscrição está na parede do ossuário, perto do arco de caveiras.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH eensk-ree-SOWN ehs-TAH NUH puh-REH-dih DOO aws-WAHR-yoo, PEHR-too DOO AH-ruh-koo DIH kuh-VAY-ruhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: The inscription is on the ossuary wall, near the skull archway.

responses.english: The inscription is on the ossuary wall, near the skull archway.
responses.phonetic: AH eensk-ree-SOWN ehs-TAH NUH puh-REH-dih DOO aws-WAHR-yoo, PEHR-too DOO AH-ruh-koo DIH kuh-VAY-ruhsh.
responses.local: A inscrição está na parede do ossuário, perto do arco de caveiras.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the São Francisco Church is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Igreja de São Francisco?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FI-ka uh ee-GREY-zhuh jee SAH-oo fran-SIS-koo
phrases.cultural_note: The chapel is structurally integrated into the larger Franciscan church complex.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, a igreja é junto à capela.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, AH eeg-REH-zhuh EH ZHOONNG-too AH kuh-PEH-luh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, the church is next to the chapel.

responses.english: Good morning, the church is next to the chapel.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, AH eeg-REH-zhuh EH ZHOONNG-too AH kuh-PEH-luh.
responses.local: Bom dia, a igreja é junto à capela.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the skull archway is located
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o arco de caveiras?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW AH-ruh-koo DIH kuh-VAY-ruhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: The skull archway is a striking feature at the entrance of the Capela dos Ossos, made from human skulls and bones.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, à entrada da capela.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, AH ayngt-RAH-duh DUH kuh-PEH-luh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the entrance of the chapel.

responses.english: Good morning, at the entrance of the chapel.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, AH ayngt-RAH-duh DUH kuh-PEH-luh.
responses.local: Bom dia, à entrada da capela.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pick up the audio guide
phrases.text_local: Onde posso retirar o guia de áudio?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo reh-tee-RAHR AW GEEUH DIH OW-deeoo?
phrases.cultural_note: Audio guides provide historical context about the Franciscan monks and the chapel's construction.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket kiosk is
phrases.text_local: Olá, onde está a bilheteira externa?
phrases.pronunciation: aw-LAH, OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh ehsh-TEH-ruh-nuh?
phrases.cultural_note: The ticket kiosk is located outside the chapel entrance, separate from the church. Look for a small booth near the main door.

likely_response.local: Do lado de fora, à direita.
likely_response.pronunciation: DOO LAH-doo DIH FAW-ruh, AH dee-RAY-tuh.

responses.phonetic: DOO LAH-doo DIH FAW-ruh, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
responses.local: Do lado de fora, à direita.
